defaultRule: Do not collect or retain fields that are not needed for reliability, abuse defense, legal compliance, or capacity planning.

classes.name: Peer stats
classes.allowedPurpose: Reliability, P2P offload measurement, abuse defense, and capacity planning.
classes.deletionRule: Delete raw peer-session rows after 14 days or aggregate them without peer identifiers.

classes.name: IP-related logs
classes.allowedPurpose: Abuse defense, rate-limit tuning, incident response, and regional capacity planning.
prohibitedFields: playback history tied to durable user identity
classes.deletionRule: Delete raw IP-bearing logs after 7 days unless preserved for a documented security incident.

classes.name: Auth logs
classes.allowedPurpose: Security auditing, key rotation verification, abuse defense, and support investigation.
classes.deletionRule: Store event outcome and key id only; delete raw request logs after 30 days.

classes.name: Playback errors
classes.allowedPurpose: Playback reliability, release quality, and device compatibility analysis.
prohibitedFields: full IP address in client payload
classes.deletionRule: Aggregate by app version, network class, device class, and channel group before long-term retention.

classes.name: Metrics
classes.allowedPurpose: Operational alerting, capacity planning, launch review, and incident retrospectives.
classes.deletionRule: Keep high-cardinality raw metrics short-lived; retain only aggregate service and channel-health series long term.
